name: NORFOLK SOUTHERN CORP
summary: Norfolk Southern Corporation is an Atlanta, Georgia-based freight railroad company operating approximately 19,100 route miles in 22 states and the District of Columbia. It transports raw materials, intermediate products, and finished goods via three commodity groups: merchandise (63% of revenues, including agriculture, chemicals, metals, automotive), intermodal (25%), and coal (12%). It operates the most extensive intermodal network in the eastern U.S. and serves Atlantic and Gulf Coast ports for overseas freight.
